name: Aromatic Bacon
method:
1. In a rondeau over medium heat, render bacon until slightly crispy
2. Once rendered, add in shallots and thyme. Allium should not color.
3. Once sweated, with shallots translucent but not browned, add toasted garlic.
4. Finish with dill and tarragon. Remove from the heat and stir to combine.
5. Strain the bacon mixture through a chinois fine-mesh strainer.
6. Allow to cool before reserving to quart containers.
7. Reserve bacon fat in quart containers and store chilled.
ingredients: Bacon, pre-sliced|10|lbs|Diced;Herbs, dill|10|gr|fresh, chopped;Herbs, Tarragon|10|gr|fresh, chopped;Herb, Thyme|5|gr|fresh, chopped;Toasted Garlic|150|gr|prepped
kitchenTools: Rondeau, knife, sheet trays, chinois strainer, rubber spatula
